analysis.executive_summary: Audit crawled 507 pages across 3 documentation domains for a single-product topology. 3 confirmed broken internal links exist in user-facing docs. 1,485 links could not be verified due to authentication or rate-limiting. API reference coverage is low at 14.84% across 65 detected API pages. Only 37.67% of pages display last-updated metadata. Overall audit confidence is 63.5%, with link verification confidence at 25% due to access restrictions.
strengths: Crawl achieved 100% coverage of discovered in-scope pages (507 of 507 requested)
No repository navigation broken links detected (repo_broken_links_count: 0)
API page detection succeeded with 65 pages identified across documentation
Example code reliability estimate is strong at 85.78%
Documentation trap URLs properly identified and skipped (28 URLs)
risks: 3 confirmed broken internal links in user-facing documentation degrade user experience
1,485 unverified links create unknown quality exposure; 25% link confidence indicates high verification gap
SEO/geo issue rate of 18.96% may harm discoverability and search ranking
API reference coverage at 14.84% leaves majority of API surface undocumented or poorly linked
37.67% freshness coverage prevents users from assessing content currency on 62% of pages
Multi-site documentation architecture (3 domains for single product) risks fragmentation and inconsistent user journeys
Overall confidence of 63.5% suggests significant audit blind spots remain

prioritized_actions.action: Repair 3 confirmed broken internal links in user-facing docs
Implement last-updated timestamps on all pages to reach 100% freshness coverage from current 37.67%
Audit and expand API reference documentation to improve 14.84% coverage baseline
Resolve SEO/geo issues affecting 18.96% of pages to improve search discoverability
Establish authentication-aware link verification process for 1,485 unverified URLs to eliminate blind spots

limitations: 25% link confidence means 1,485 URLs behind authentication or rate-limits were not verified; actual broken link count may be higher
External audit cannot validate accuracy of technical content, code examples, or API specifications
Multi-domain architecture may hide cross-site navigation issues or content duplication not detectable by single-pass crawl
Freshness metadata absence on 62% of pages prevents audit from assessing actual content staleness or accuracy drift
